## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.10

### 🎥 Cameras
- Improves recording playback handling for SD-card/local clips by using the APK local playback request first and only using the existing capture path when the returned playback URL is not directly cacheable by Home Assistant.
- Keeps cloud/direct recording URLs and SD-card/local recording playback separate so each clip can use the best available path from its own payload.
- Keeps the existing live camera stream path unchanged.

### 🧯 Alarms
- Adds Home Assistant events for reported self-test results so automations can react to physical/app-reported self-test updates.
- Expands self-test report parsing for nested APK payloads and additional self-test fault fields.

### 🧩 Devices
- Adds APK alias handling and entity mapping coverage for additional X-Sense device variants.
- Keeps mute-status and related pre-created entities available for supported smoke detector paths without inventing states before X-Sense reports them.

### 🛠️ Fixes
- Skips noisy IPC camera metadata warnings for accounts without an IPC camera registration.
